sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Flight Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a helicopter launched from an aircraft carrier. Core movement is flight-based rather than platformer movement.

special_mechanics.name: Bomb Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Player attacks factories and infrastructure by bombing targets across islands. No specific physics parameters documented.

special_mechanics.name: Factory Escalation System
special_mechanics.description: Factories grow and develop new technologies over time. Player must bomb them quickly to prevent overwhelming counterattacks.

tier_notes: Tier 3 qualitative data only. This is a shoot-em-up/action-strategy game, not a traditional platformer. No specific movement physics parameters (walk speed, jump velocity, gravity, etc.) are documented in available sources. Game focuses on helicopter flight mechanics and bombing strategy rather than character platforming movement.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Raid on Bungeling Bay (NES)
